description: In the SyncApp project, implement a foreground service for background data synchronization. Create a Kotlin class DataSyncService in app/src/main/java/com/example/syncapp/service/DataSyncService.kt that extends android.app.Service. The service must initialize a NotificationChannel named 'Data Sync' (ID: 'data_sync_channel', Importance: LOW) and call startForeground in onStartCommand using a notification with ID 1, title 'Syncing Data', and icon android.R.drawable.ic_popup_sync. Ensure onStartCommand returns START_STICKY and onBind returns null. Update app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml to include FOREGROUND_SERVICE and FOREGROUND_SERVICE_DATA_SYNC permissions and declare the service with foregroundServiceType="dataSync" and exported="false". The project must build successfully.
